name: Compare AI legal tools vs hiring a real attorney for visibility?
description: AI for finding lawyers; humans for cases.[4][1]

mainEntity.name: Compare AI legal tools vs hiring a real attorney for visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI for finding lawyers; humans for cases.[4][1]
acceptedAnswer.description: AI boosts online findability for lawyers but can't replace human advice or privilege.[4][1] Tools aid marketing, not cases.[4] Key factors: AI for discovery, lawyers for protection.[1] Use AI to find attorneys, not strategize. Best combo.
